Description
software.amazon.lambda.durable

software.amazon.lambda.durable.retry
 
  • Classes in software.amazon.lambda.durable.retry used by software.amazon.lambda.durable
    Class
    Description
    PollingStrategy
    Functional interface for computing polling delays between attempts.
  • Classes in software.amazon.lambda.durable.retry used by software.amazon.lambda.durable.config
    Class
    Description
    RetryStrategy
    Functional interface for determining retry behavior when operations fail.
    WaitForConditionWaitStrategy
    Strategy that computes the delay before the next polling attempt in a waitForCondition operation.
  • Classes in software.amazon.lambda.durable.retry used by software.amazon.lambda.durable.retry
    Class
    Description
    JitterStrategy
    Jitter strategy for retry delays to prevent thundering herd problems.
    PollingStrategy
    Functional interface for computing polling delays between attempts.
    RetryDecision
    Represents a decision about whether to retry a failed operation and how long to wait.
    RetryStrategy
    Functional interface for determining retry behavior when operations fail.
    WaitForConditionWaitStrategy
    Strategy that computes the delay before the next polling attempt in a waitForCondition operation.
